wydseoul2027.en
 53w
The WYD symbols, the Cross and the Virgin Mary, welcomed pilgrims from Diocese of Fukuoka, Archdiocese of Osaka-Takamatsu, Diocese of Nagoya, and Archdiocese of Tokyo from April 29 to May 11. This time, two Koreans young peoples who preparing for the Seoul WYD 2027 were sent to Diocese of Fukuoka for an even more meaningful pilgrimage.

Now, this time of grace continues in the Philippines with The WYD symbols!

#Seoul2027 #WYDSeoul2027 #WYDSymbol #WYDCross #SalusPopuliRomani
